models.title: Compotite 24in. Tile-in Top Black ABS Linear Drain Cover Plate
source_fields:
• Allows for tile to inlay into the drain body creating a streamlined modern design for your shower floor
  • Reinforced tray fits directly into Compotite Linear Drain Body
  • Tray is removable for easy cleaning of drain body and integrated hair strainer (included)

models.title: Compotite 24in. Linear Drain Body Black ABS Linear Shower Drain
source_fields:
• High quality American made linear drains add modern style and functionality to any custom tile or stone shower installation
  • Plank pitch allows for large format tile or stone to be used on the shower floor
  • Proprietary internal step to support stainless steel Linear Drain Grate, Tile-Over Top or Tile-In Top (sold seperately)
  • 1 inch textured bonding flange makes for easy waterproofing installation (adds 2 inches to rough length of drain body-26 inches)
  • Integrated hair strainer comes with stainless steel Linear Drain Grate and Tile-In Top
  • ABS one-piece injection mold construction
  • Ideal for tub to shower conversions
  • Internal slope for superior drainage

models.title: DELTA® DT0733670 Linear Shower Drain, Stainless Steel Drain, Import
source_fields: Delta® Linear Drains allow you to customize your bathroom appearance and functionality with a seamless aesthetic and quality performance. By incorporating convenience and design, these adjustable drains bring personalized height modifications to fit your needs and are designed to match color-body tile, marble, and natural stone.
